description: Tests that autoresearch runs the skill_improve.py score-improve-keep/revert loop and verifies the API key first

tests.expected_output_description: Runs skill_improve.py against the SKILL.md, verifies key, reports results

assertions.check: Output references the --skill argument pointing at the SKILL.md file
Output mentions verifying an Anthropic API key is available before running
Output mentions that improvements are committed and regressions reverted
Output describes scoring the skill, making one targeted change, and re-scoring
Output mentions keeping the change if the score improves and reverting otherwise
Output mentions it repeats until a perfect score or a max-iterations limit
